descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: characteristic length scale of crystalline grains
descriptors.rationale: fundamental microstructure length scale affects properties

quality.loss_reason: reduces full distribution to single statistic
quality.notes: loses grain size distribution shape information

descriptors.name: crystallographic texture
descriptors.rationale: controls anisotropic mechanical and physical properties

quality.loss_reason: finite truncation of infinite basis expansion
quality.truncation_error: decreases with higher order terms retained
quality.notes: controlled approximation with known convergence properties

descriptors.name: local strain heterogeneity
descriptors.rationale: indicates strain localization affecting failure mechanisms

representation.notes: statistical measure of strain field variance

quality.loss_reason: collapses spatial field to variance statistic
quality.notes: loses spatial correlation and higher moment information

representation.notes: mean subgrain size plus boundary density

quality.loss_reason: reduces distributions to two summary statistics
quality.notes: loses subgrain size distribution and topology

descriptors.name: grain boundary character distribution
descriptors.rationale: boundary character controls migration and energy

representation.encoding: fractions for CSL and random types
representation.notes: histogram over boundary types Sigma3 Sigma9

quality.loss_reason: discretizes continuous misorientation space into bins
quality.notes: standard binning loses fine misorientation details

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: line length of dislocations per volume

representation.notes: total or geometrically necessary dislocation density

quality.loss_reason: averages spatially varying and type-dependent densities
quality.notes: loses dislocation type and spatial distribution

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.rationale: indicates deformation history and texture strength

representation.notes: mean aspect ratio across grain population

quality.loss_reason: reduces shape distribution to single statistic
quality.notes: loses orientation and distribution of elongated grains

descriptors.name: twin density
descriptors.physical_meaning: abundance of twin boundaries or volume
descriptors.rationale: twinning affects strain hardening and texture

representation.notes: twin volume fraction preferred for simplicity

quality.loss_reason: loses twin type and spatial arrangement
quality.notes: cannot distinguish twin systems or morphologies

descriptors.name: grain boundary energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: average excess energy at grain interfaces
descriptors.rationale: drives grain growth and boundary migration

representation.notes: weighted average over boundary character distribution

quality.loss_reason: averages over heterogeneous boundary energy distribution
quality.notes: loses spatial and character-specific energy variation

descriptors.name: stored energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: total defect energy in deformed microstructure

representation.notes: integrated defect energy over representative volume

quality.loss_reason: integrates spatially varying energy into scalar
quality.notes: loses spatial heterogeneity of stored energy

descriptors.name: misorientation distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: statistical distribution of grain boundary angles
descriptors.rationale: determines boundary properties and evolution kinetics

representation.notes: discretized probability density over angle bins

quality.loss_reason: discretization and loss of axis information
quality.notes: loses rotation axis only retains angle
